prestazioni: Rebuild of the original 2.5L RB625 inline-6 engine with a bespoke dry-sump system featuring a Titan Motorsport billet aluminum oil pan and a Dailey Engineering 4-stage scavenge pump to eliminate oil starvation during high-G cornering, paired with a custom camshaft profile by Kent Cams (280° duration, 11.5mm lift) for optimized high-RPM power delivery (8,500 RPM redline).

Installation of a custom-built fuel system incorporating a pair of Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, AN-8 braided lines, and a set of 12x ID1000 injectors by Injector Dynamics, controlled via a Motec M150 ECU with a DBR1-specific calibration map for 100+ octane race fuel compatibility.

Upgrade to a bespoke 6-speed sequential gearbox by Hewland (DGZ model) with a magnesium bellhousing, paired with a Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch and a Quaife ATB differential (85% lock) for optimal power transfer, replacing the original 5-speed manual.
estetica: Full carbon fiber bodywork replacement using a custom DBR1-specific kit by RS Limited (UK), including a 3-piece front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts, all constructed from pre-preg autoclave carbon fiber (1x1 weave) with a clear matte finish for weight reduction (saving ~45kg).

Installation of a period-correct yet upgraded aerodynamic package featuring a 9 Lives Racing adjustable rear wing (3-element, 1,200mm width) with titanium mounting brackets and a Gurney flap for downforce tuning, paired with a custom aluminum radiator shroud by Radtec for improved airflow management.

Interior overhaul with a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard, Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, FIA 8862-2009 certified) with 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses, and a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip) featuring a quick-release hub by NRG Innovations.
